label: Professional
description: Work as it actually happened, written up once it was safe to.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a fountain-pen nib"><path d="M32 8 L44 40 L32 52 L20 40 Z" opacity=".6"/><path d="M32 30 L32 52"/><circle cx="32" cy="34" r="3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity=".85"/></svg>

label: Philosophy
description: Dreams, epistemology, and other things that resist tidy answers.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of an eye within a triangle"><path d="M32 6 L58 54 L6 54 Z" opacity=".55"/><ellipse cx="32" cy="39" rx="14" ry="8" opacity=".8"/><circle cx="32" cy="39" r="4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>

label: Projects
description: Things underway, things finished, and things I have quietly stopped pretending I will get back to.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a gear and compass"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="14"/><path d="M32 10v6M32 48v6M10 32h6M48 32h6M16.9 16.9l4.2 4.2M42.9 42.9l4.2 4.2M16.9 47.1l4.2-4.2M42.9 21.1l4.2-4.2"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>

label: Exposures
description: Exposure series, arranged by subject and season, from a camera that goes most places I do.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a camera aperture"><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="22"/><path d="M32 14 L46 22 L46 42 L32 50 L18 42 L18 22 Z" opacity=".6"/><circle cx="32" cy="32" r="6" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity=".85"/></svg>

label: Family
description: The people this account is kept for, and occasionally about.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a house with a hearth"><path d="M12 30 L32 12 L52 30" opacity=".6"/><path d="M18 30 L18 52 L46 52 L46 30"/><rect x="28" y="40" width="8" height="12" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity=".35"/></svg>

label: Fiction
description: Invented accounts, filed honestly as such.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a theatrical mask"><path d="M12 24 Q32 18 52 24 Q50 42 32 50 Q14 42 12 24 Z" opacity=".55"/><ellipse cx="24" cy="30" rx="4" ry="3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity=".8"/><ellipse cx="40" cy="30" rx="4" ry="3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" opacity=".8"/></svg>

label: Misc
description: Everything that refused to be filed anywhere else.
glyphSvg: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" role="img" aria-label="Illustration of a filing tag"><path d="M22 12 L44 12 L44 44 L33 52 L22 44 Z" opacity=".6"/><circle cx="33" cy="22" r="3.5"/><path d="M27 34 h12" opacity=".7"/></svg>
